rationale: User support question about incorrect API usage (old MongoDB() class); no spec rule violated.
Incorrectly enabled system crypto profile on Windows builds; build/config fix, not spec-related.
Build errors mixing bundled and system libbson/libmongoc headers; build issue only.
Packaging improvement to prevent mixing bundled and system libraries; build/packaging only.
WriteResult debug handler returns arrays instead of objects; API ergonomics, no spec rule contradicted.
Assert failure in libmongoc after failed getMore during shutdown; internal crash, no spec rule violation.
Segfault in stream timeout during PHP request shutdown; internal lifecycle crash, no spec rule.
BSON spec requires alphabetized Regex flags; driver failed to alphabetize when instantiating from raw BSON data.
BSON corpus spec test failure: array element keys must be disregarded; driver used wrong PHP array append function.
BSON corpus spec test failure: empty-string key subdoc; driver ignored zero-length property names during encoding.
Null bytes in field names caused incorrect BSON via PHP5 HashTable length; internal PHP5 bug, no specific spec rule on null-byte length handling.
Driver silently accepted null bytes in BSON keys; DRIVERS-101 link indicates spec requires error; should throw.
Missing PHP symbol in older PHP versions; language runtime compatibility issue, not spec-related.
Missing PHP date symbol in older PHP versions; language runtime compatibility, not spec-related.
Windows CA store opened without read-only flag; TLS implementation bug in libmongoc, tracking ticket only.
BSON get_properties handlers leak memory during PHP GC checks; memory leak, no spec rule violated.
Spec requires readConcern not be sent in getMore commands; driver incorrectly included it.
Child process reuses parent's mongoc_client_t objects; internal connection lifecycle bug, no spec rule on forking.
Redundant BSON conversion before iteration; performance issue, no spec rule violated.
Using zend_string_free() instead of zend_string_release(); internal PHP memory management fix, no spec behavior.
Distribute pharext release archive; packaging/distribution task, no spec behavior.
Child processes destroy parent's clients during MSHUTDOWN; internal PHP fork lifecycle bug, no spec rule.
Spec: false slaveOk should not change read preference; driver always set secondaryPreferred when slaveOk present regardless of value.
SASL auth triggered every request under PHP-FPM; performance issue, no specific auth spec rule on re-auth frequency violated.
Server selection spec: localThresholdMS default is 15ms; libmongoc defaulted to 15000ms (15 seconds), driver worked around upstream bug.
Use-after-free crash when cursor killed during PHP shutdown functions; internal object lifetime bug, no spec rule.
Use-after-free with PHP generators freeing Manager before Cursor; internal PHP object lifecycle crash, no spec rule.
php_phongo_pclient_t wrapper struct leaked during MSHUTDOWN; memory leak, no spec rule violated.
Compiler error when building without SSL; build/configuration issue, no spec behavior.
Stop throwing exceptions for libmongoc critical/error log levels; internal logging behavior, no spec rule.
Redundant zend_string_release() causing leak in BSON encoding; internal memory management fix, no spec behavior.
PHP 7 memory leaks in driver; internal memory management, no spec rule violated.
Crash when projection has empty field name; implementation bug in libmongoc, tracking ticket only.
Server selection spec requires localThresholdMS of zero to be respected; libmongoc treated zero as unset and used default.
Clang errors on unrecognized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable flag; build/compiler issue only.
Validate Query filter/options at construct time to prevent downstream crash; defensive improvement, no specific spec rule on validation timing.
Define PHP_MONGODB_VERSION constant for Pickle package manager compatibility; packaging/tooling.
Segfault freeing interned strings for SSL options; internal PHP memory management bug, no spec rule.
Use mongoc_uri_new_with_error() for better URI parse error messages; error reporting improvement, no spec conformance issue.
DRIVERS-308 link indicates spec requires document validation before insert/update; driver delegated without validating dot/dollar keys.
Map MONGOC_ERROR_COMMAND_INVALID_ARG to InvalidArgumentException instead of RuntimeException; exception type improvement, no specific spec rule.
ReadPreference constructor must accept string values matching URI readPreference option per spec; only integers accepted.
BSON encoding segfaults on circular references instead of throwing; no specific BSON spec rule mandates error on circular refs.
Memory leak when bsonSerialize() returns keys with null bytes; memory management bug following PHPC-891 fix.
Wire protocol specifies cursor IDs are signed 64-bit integers; driver stored and rendered them as unsigned.
setTypeMap()/toPHP() should return early on invalid type map; API robustness improvement, no spec rule on early return behavior.
SCRAM invalid salt length error when using x509 auth; likely misconfiguration or libmongoc bug; thin on spec rule violation evidence.
CRUD spec requires error for update newObj mixing modifiers and field names at top level; driver accepted ambiguous input without validation.
Driver threw BulkWriteException for empty BulkWrite instead of InvalidArgumentException; spec requires argument validation errors use correct exception type.
Missing early return after phongo_bson_to_zval_ex() failure in Server methods; defensive error-handling fix, no spec rule violated.
